text:
Magnetic Force (, rom. Magunetikku Fōsu) is a spell card that can be found in the Greed Island game. It allows a player to be transported to the location of another player they have previously met.
__NOTOC__

Summary

This card allows the user to be instantly transported to another player in the game, providing that they have previously met them. Similar to "Accompany", but it only allows for the user to be transported. This card is particularly useful when a player wants to meet with another player in person. The card is destroyed after one use.

|-
![Eng]
|No.1005 :: Magnetic Force 
Fly to the place of another player you specify. (That you've previously met in the game.)
|}

Trivia

The player depicted in this card's illustration recurs in "Collision" and "Accompany".
Furthermore, the illustration of the latter card is identical to that of "Magnetic Force", only with a greater number of players.
In Chapter 185 it is revealed that Ging had Elena program the spell so that if Gon used it on "Nigg", he would be sent to him, but that if he cast "Accompany" instead, he and any friend of his would be transported to Kite's location.
